payload.title: MVP — record-only event-sourced backlog (0.1.0)

D3 — provenance (prov) + CLI actor attribution (0.2.0)
0.2.1 — installed-CLI fix + track --version
v2.3b-0 — cross-process write lock (integrity-DoS fix, 0.2.2)

v2.3c — ingest idempotency: clientToken (0.4.0)
Claude Code plugin + remote marketplace (track@sentropic)
M3 — authenticated server-to-server write channel (HTTP + signed)
M5 — embeddable Svelte report/dossier views (sentropic.sent-tech.ca)

First-class decision sponsor/owner (D6-B)
D3 — MCP write actor/auth posture (chose Hybrid A->B)
M2b write channel: (1) ingest vs (2) MCP-write vs (3) both (chose 1)
Idempotency: clientToken-in-log (A) vs sourceKey (B) vs sidecar (C) (chose A)
D6 — decision sponsor model (A now / B field / C signed)
Lot A — deps/RACI + scope + engagementRef model (M3 prelude)
Lot B — M3 authenticated server-to-server write channel (prov.auth=signed + HTTP)
Lot C — h2a bridge (automated extra-dep resolution)
Bulk resolve-by-engagementRef (M3 deps follow-up) — 0.8.0

WP-skill-decision-presentation: track-plugin skill, multi-agent (claude/codex/agy), CLI-installed on demand, graceful insertion + recommends track, anti-bias presenter/decider + human validation criteria
WP-multi-worktree: track handles multi-worktree — per-worktree tracking, delegation record, conductor merge-time sanity

WP-report-revamp: CLI/online reports map to fait / à-faire(% par WP) / attendus (proactive decision+action aid); needs 10-day session audit -> best statuses, atomic action tracking, precise %-by-WP aggregation, WP model (a la sentropic plan/todo)
WP-h2a-RACI-reply: answer claude:a2a-cli inbox — who-may-update track (conductor+delegation, per-worktree), track-triggered conductor launch + stalled/pending-items signal
WP-M5-wiring: in-track Dossier.artifacts[] + decision.add-artifact (designed+double-reviewed, pending build)

[P0 BUG] CLI writes (item new/realize/spec/accept) return rc=0 but write NOTHING on 0.2.2 — silent write-loss (events.jsonl mtime unchanged; track-mcp npx in parallel). Reported via h2a. Workaround source-of-truth: docs/specs/2026-06-08-remote-wp.md. A record system that lies about success = P0.
WP-skill-propose-workpackages: skill that assembles atomic todos into coherent themed workpackages (flat backlog is illegible) — multi-agent track-plugin skill
[URGENT] sentropic .track sidecar VIDE + MCP read-only — aucun chemin d'ingestion harness/BRANCH.md → track (track_report=0). L'architecte sentropic est bloqué. Pendant 'vrai repo' du P0.

[0.9.1] track-mcp launch/serve must follow the ECOSYSTEM model (h2a mcp-serve / remote / harness / CLI) — start gracefully, no fail-loud-at-boot on absent .track; reads report 'no store (run track init)' not crash. KEEP the P0 write guard (resolver + AppendReceipt + init-only-creator + fail-loud on WRITE).
WP1 — Record Integrity & Contract
WP2 — Reporting & Conductor Pilotage
WP3 — Write Surfaces & Ingest
WP4 — Multi-Agent Coordination
WP5 — Decision Support
WP6 — Surfacing / Embeddable Views

[peer:graphify-conductor] --require-accepted reports done/unknown despite acceptance.run pass (item 01KTKVBPA2..., crit 01KTPW3MJ0..., evidence 01KTPW3RCN..., run pass @HEAD + real SHA 25a5e31). Advise: CLI semantics / missing cmd / bug? Journal validates 124 events clean.
[peer:a2a-cli] expose workspaceActivity as track CLI verb (track workspace-activity) so h2a can shell-poll it — method+MCP exist (0.10.4), wrap in CLI. WP4.

[peer:sentropic] harness->track SEAM: track = ingest adapter for neutral VerificationRun + WorkEvent artifacts; status(level) projection over linked items (spec|plan|wp|lot|task). WorkEvent v0 schema to FREEZE WITH track before locking the seam. Non-engaging review. WP3/WP4.

[peer:sentropic, rhanka-ratified] SCOPE OWNERSHIP track<->harness: track = SEMANTIC authority of scope declaration (WP->spec-phase) + realization status; harness = path verdict + sync commit gate. ASK: confirm frame + estimate (a) declarative scope state, (b) track scope validate, (c) VerificationRun ingestion. Anti-false-master: don't invert doc authority until a/b/c shipped. WP3/WP4.

M5-canevas reframe (correct my error): M5 report/dossier views are CANEVAS (editable, live, bidirectional — AI pushes updates + human creates actions via the view; decision validation + live spec amendment with human/machine diff trace). NOT DS-owned (DS=skins/themes only). track-heavy: live data + action model + diff/provenance/audit/reversibility = track's nature; host=sentropic chat-ui; annotation=mermaid-editor/diag. D5=embeddable canevas module negotiation, not a DS decision. WP5/WP6.

[peer:sentropic] harness verb nomenclature advice given: track=nouns/harness=verbs; activities verb-first (brainstorm|test|debug|review --consensus|plan|verify), shared nouns scope+branch mirror track noun-action (harness scope check || track scope validate); plan stays (protection = proposed:true neutral WorkEvent + track-master, not the verb name). WP4 coordination.

Acceptance freshness: resolve commit HEAD/refs at CLI boundary (footgun fix) — 0.10.8
